mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_NUMBER AS reportNumber, MATCHING_NUMBER, SUBJECT_TITLE, TO_CHAR(REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reportDateStr FROM UB_LEARNING_REPORT WHERE MATCHING_NUMBER = #{matchingNumber} ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC
SELECT REPORT_NUMBER AS reportNumber, MATCHING_NUMBER, SUBJECT_TITLE, SUBJECT_CONTENT, REPORT_WEEK, REPORT_SESSION FROM UB_LEARNING_REPORT WHERE REPORT_NUMBER = #{reportNumber}
